records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? How did you know...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? How did you know...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well then you should have said so sooner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Northern Union woman named Lenore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Northern Union woman named Lenore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Northern Union woman named Lenore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh...? Lenore?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh...? Lenore?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh...? Lenore?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You aren't family, so what is your purpose?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You aren't family, so what is your purpose?

records.m_Talk_DEU: I plan to pay her back for every hit and take her to the Family Alliance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I plan to pay her back for every hit and take her to the Family Alliance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her power comes from the Family Alliance. If she is trying to walk a path different from the clone, I cannot just leave her be.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Her power comes from the Family Alliance. If she is trying to walk a path different from the clone, I cannot just leave her be.

records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, Andrei?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, Andrei?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this hour no one should be there. Why now?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. I was about to go for another bowl, and now I cannot sit still.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Give me the location of that building. You fed me, so I will lend a hand while I am at it.

It's dangerous to go alone. At least take some from the militia with you
8g

8g

It's dangerous to go alone. At least take some from the militia with you

records.m_Talk_DEU: Olga, I came to return the comic I borrowed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Olga, I came to return the comic I borrowed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, who is this person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, who is this person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, who is this person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...!

records.m_Talk_DEU: This Repulsor Gun... The material, the strength is all excellent...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This Repulsor Gun... The material, the strength is all excellent...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you make this weapon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you make this weapon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you make this weapon?

records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't make it from scratch. I just tweaked it with techniques I learned from a friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't make it from scratch. I just tweaked it with techniques I learned from a friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good enough! To think there are still youngsters like you in this day and age!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good enough! To think there are still youngsters like you in this day and age!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good enough! To think there are still youngsters like you in this day and age!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ever thought about becoming a blacksmith? Your talent would shine in front of the forge!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ever thought about becoming a blacksmith? Your talent would shine in front of the forge!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ever thought about becoming a blacksmith? Your talent would shine in front of the forge!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, but please refrain from trying to recruit one of our members.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, but please refrain from trying to recruit one of our members.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, but please refrain from trying to recruit one of our members.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka, the lab just had an issue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka, the lab just had an issue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, the lab just had an issue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You remember the off-limits zone, right? If you can, go check it out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You remember the off-limits zone, right? If you can, go check it out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You remember the off-limits zone, right? If you can, go check it out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. No problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. No problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. No problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should I go alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should I go alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should I go alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are still young and full of possibilities! Four hours daily! No, three and a half!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are still young and full of possibilities! Four hours daily! No, three and a half!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are still young and full of possibilities! Four hours daily! No, three and a half!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, just look my way...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, just look my way...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, just look my way...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Before that, I would appreciate it if you put this person down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Before that, I would appreciate it if you put this person down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Before that, I would appreciate it if you put this person down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-she's a Counter who offered to help us, for the record.
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-she's a Counter who offered to help us, for the record.
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-she's a Counter who offered to help us, for the record.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's strong, so I'm sure she'll be useful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's strong, so I'm sure she'll be useful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's strong, so I'm sure she'll be useful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Since it's you, Olga, I'll trust her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Since it's you, Olga, I'll trust her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Since it's you, Olga, I'll trust her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... You took my hand. Have you perhaps taken a shine to the way of the blacksmith?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... You took my hand. Have you perhaps taken a shine to the way of the blacksmith?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oof... Kids these days are bursting with energy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oof... Kids these days are bursting with energy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oof... Kids these days are bursting with energy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To think I would get princess-carried at my age.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To think I would get princess-carried at my age.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To think I would get princess-carried at my age.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I doubt the age gap is that big.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I doubt the age gap is that big.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I doubt the age gap is that big.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, tsk. Do not judge by appearances. I have been around since back when tigers smoked pipes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, tsk. Do not judge by appearances. I have been around since back when tigers smoked pipes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, tsk. Do not judge by appearances. I have been around since back when tigers smoked pipes.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Those were the days. Everyone knew who you meant when you said, "the forge-master of the kilns."

root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... You took my hand. Have you perhaps taken a shine to the way of the blacksmith?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... You took my hand. Have you perhaps taken a shine to the way of the blacksmith?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That's it, girl! In that case, why not come to the forge with me and

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oof... Kids these days are bursting with energy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oof... Kids these days are bursting with energy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oof... Kids these days are bursting with energy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To think I would get princess-carried at my age.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To think I would get princess-carried at my age.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To think I would get princess-carried at my age.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I doubt the age gap is that big.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I doubt the age gap is that big.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I doubt the age gap is that big.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, tsk. Do not judge by appearances. I have been around since back when tigers smoked pipes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, tsk. Do not judge by appearances. I have been around since back when tigers smoked pipes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, tsk. Do not judge by appearances. I have been around since back when tigers smoked pipes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those were the days. Everyone knew who you meant when you said, "the forge-master of the kilns."
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those were the days. Everyone knew who you meant when you said, "the forge-master of the kilns."
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those were the days. Everyone knew who you meant when you said, "the forge-master of the kilns."

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your name. Isn't it too long?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your name. Isn't it too long?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your name. Isn't it too long?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is not my name, it is an epithet. My real name is Nao, short and neat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is not my name, it is an epithet. My real name is Nao, short and neat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is not my name, it is an epithet. My real name is Nao, short and neat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, we have not exchanged names. What is my future apprentice called?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, we have not exchanged names. What is my future apprentice called?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, we have not exchanged names. What is my future apprentice called?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really plan on becoming your apprentice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really plan on becoming your apprentice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really plan on becoming your apprentice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But my name is Mavka Gagarina.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But my name is Mavka Gagarina.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But my name is Mavka Gagarina.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The last name, I borrowed from a friend.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The last name, I borrowed from a friend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The last name, I borrowed from a friend.
